eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Lincoln, NM; at 1:59 PM on JUL 20, 2026 Effective until 5:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Ruidoso Emergency Management: Flash Flooding is OBSERVED along US 70. Rapidly rising floodwaters have been reported in the US 70 Area including Cherokee Mobile Home Park and nearby businesses. Rapidly rising floodwaters may impact roadways and low-lying areas. For your safety avoid travel and move immediately to higher ground! Do not delay leaving to gather any belongings or make efforts to protect your home. You can find more information by tuning into 1490 AM or VOR social media channels.
